title: Measurements
excerpt: COOKING TERMS MEASURING CUPS 1/4 = 60ml 1/3 = 80 ml 1/2 = 125 ml 3/4 = 180 ml 1 = 250 ml 2 = 500 ml 3 = 750 ml DESSERT SPOON(S) 1 = 12,5 ml 2 = 25 ml TABLESPOONS 1 = 15 ml 2 = 30 ml 3 = 45 …
html:
COOKING TERMS

MEASURING CUPS

  • 1/4 = 60ml
  • 1/3 = 80 ml
  • 1/2 = 125 ml
  • 3/4 = 180 ml
  • 1 = 250 ml
  • 2 = 500 ml
  • 3 = 750 ml

DESSERT SPOON(S)

  • 1 = 12,5 ml
  • 2 = 25 ml

TABLESPOONS

  • 1 = 15 ml
  • 2 = 30 ml
  • 3 = 45 ml
  • 4 = 60 ml

TEASPOON(S)

  • 1/4 = 1ml
  • 1/2 = 2ml
  • 1 = 5ml
  • 2 = 10 ml
  • 3 = 15 ml
  • 4 = 20 ml

ABBREVIATIONS

  • kg = kilogram
  • g = gram
  • l = litre
  • ml = millilitre
  • °C = degrees Celsius
  • min = minute
  • h = hour
  • mm = millimetre
  • m = metre
  • kPa = kilopascal (pressure)
